variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18033 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18033 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18033 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P902312 Air Filter, Safety | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18033
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P902312 Air Filter, Safety acts as a crucial secondary layer of defense in your air filtration system, capturing fine dust particles that bypass the primary filter. This extra layer of protection helps prevent engine wear and supports consistent performance, especially in dusty or harsh environments. Compact and durable, this safety air filter operates without restricting airflow, complementing the primary filter for comprehensive engine protection. Itâ€™s essential for maintaining clean air intake and maximizing engine lifespan.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF27869 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18033
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF27869 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
